Name: delete_departments
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (DELETE FROM "public"."departments" WHERE departments."name" = $1::text RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name", '[]'::json AS "employees" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
